M-005.NAME: referrals
M-005.owns: referral codes, referral links and bonus accounting with anti-fraud checks

exports.fn-generate_referral_code: Create unique referral code for user
exports.fn-apply_referral_code: Link verified new user to referrer and process bonus
exports.fn-process_first_payment: Grant exactly one paid-referral bonus to the referrer after the referred user's qualifying first payment.
exports.fn-get_referral_stats: Return referral count and bonus for user
exports.fn-get_referrals_list: Return referral rows for user-facing masked identity rendering.

phase-69-scope.in: One-time paid-referral bonus, active subscription extension, pending first-VPN referral reward, duplicate processing guard, and masked referred identity.
phase-69-scope.out: Referral fraud scoring, admin referral redesign, raw referred email exposure, deploy/install changes, and live YooKassa credential setup.

M-005.evidence: 2026-06-04: Phase-69 referral tests passed for active extension, no-active pending referral bonus, duplicate webhook idempotency, and masked referred identity; Phase-69 smoke passed.
